zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary de Heton於大約1353年出生在英國諾圖波藍德林加姆時，她的父親Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham39歲，母親Lady Constance De Leybourne34歲。她於1375年與Sir William De Swinburne在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1415年6月之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary de Heton于大约1353年出生在英国諾圖波藍德林加姆时，她的父亲Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham39岁，母亲Lady Constance De Leybourne34岁。她于1375年与Sir William De Swinburne在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1415年6月之后。

nameMeanings.name: Heton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary de Heton was born about 1353, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, her father, Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham, was 39 and her mother, Lady Constance De Leybourne, was 34. She married Sir William De Swinburne in 1375, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died after June 1415.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary de Heton est née environ 1353, à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Constance De Leybourne, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William De Swinburne en 1375, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après juin 1415.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary de Heton um 1353 in Chillingham, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham 39 und ihre Mutter Lady Constance De Leybourne 34. Sie hat 1375 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Sir William De Swinburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach Juni 1415.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary de Heton è nata il circa 1353 nel Chillingham, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lady Constance De Leybourne, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir William De Swinburne nel 1375, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il giugno 1415.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary de Hetonが約1353年にイギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムで生まれた時，父Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellinghamは39歳，母Lady Constance De Leybourneは34歳であった。1375年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでSir William De Swinburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年6月以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary de Heton(이)가 대략 1353년 영국 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Constance De Leybourne(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Sir William De Swinburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 6월 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary de Heton nasceu aproximadamente 1353, em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Constance De Leybourne, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William De Swinburne em 1375, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após junho de 1415.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary de Heton родилась около 1353 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Constance De Leybourne, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William De Swinburne в 1375 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после июнь 1415 г.

sm.about 1353–after June 1415: e tusa o le 1353–ina ua ma'ea le Iuni 1415

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary de Heton nació aproximadamente 1353, en Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Constance De Leybourne, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir William De Swinburne en 1375, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de junio de 1415.
